message:
feat(vc_alert): complete Tokio-to-Asupersync migration (Phase 2b)

Migrate all tokio usage in vc_alert to native asupersync APIs:

- AlertChannel::deliver() now takes &Cx for structured concurrency
- TuiChannel uses asupersync::channel::mpsc instead of tokio::sync::mpsc
- DesktopChannel uses asupersync::process::Command instead of tokio
- ChannelManager::deliver_all() threads Cx to all channels
- All #[tokio::test] replaced with #[test] + run_async()/test_cx()
- Removed tokio and asupersync-tokio-compat from dependencies
- Added futures to dev-dependencies for block_on in tests

Zero tokio references remain in vc_alert.

Part of bd-1a4: Phase 2b - Migrate vc_alert to Asupersync

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -16,8 +16,6 @@ vc_store.workspace = true

-asupersync-tokio-compat.workspace = true
-tokio.workspace = true
 async-trait.workspace = true
 thiserror.workspace = true
 tracing.workspace = true
@@ -26,7 +24,7 @@ dashmap.workspace = true
 reqwest.workspace = true
 
 [dev-dependencies]
+futures.workspace = true
 proptest.workspace = true
 mockall.workspace = true
 asupersync.workspace = true
-asupersync-tokio-compat.workspace = true
